panels.title: kWh hoy
panels.description: ∫ power dt ≈ Σ(power_W × 5min) / 60 / 1000. Suma sobre todas las aulas.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: today())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "power_01")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * (5.0 / 60.0) / 1000.0 }))
  |> group()
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: today())
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "power_01")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * (5.0 / 60.0) / 1000.0 * 0.18 }))
  |> group()
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "power_01")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 1000.0 }))

from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "power_01")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * (5.0 / 60.0) / 1000.0 }))
  |> group(columns: ["asset_id"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> top(n: 1, columns: ["_value"])
  |> keep(columns: ["asset_id", "_value"])

panels.title: Power por aula 24h (top-10) — kW
panels.description: Top 10 aulas por consumo total 24h. Series visible hasta 10 (no 70). Bucket: telemetry (raw).

targets.query:
topAulas = from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "power_01")
  |> group(columns: ["asset_id"])
  |> mean()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)
  |> keep(columns: ["asset_id"])
  |> findColumn(fn: (key) => true, column: "asset_id")

from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "power_01")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => contains(value: r.asset_id, set: topAulas))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 1000.0 }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "asset_id"])

panels.title: T_exterior vs Power total — correlación clima/consumo
panels.description: Power total stack (eje izq) vs temperatura exterior (eje der). Correlación visual.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "power_01")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 1000.0, _field: "power_total_kW" }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "temperature-outdoor")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "T_outdoor_C" }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "_field"])

panels.title: Top-10 aulas por kWh (24h)
panels.description: Ranking energético. Identifica candidatas a auditoría. Color rojo = mayor consumo.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "power_01")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * (5.0 / 60.0) / 1000.0 }))
  |> group(columns: ["asset_id"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 10)
  |> keep(columns: ["asset_id", "_value"])

panels.title: Load profile diario — kW total por hora
panels.description: Patrón 24h promedio del power total. Detecta picos y valles del día.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "captia_point" and r.variable == "power_01")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> sum()
  |> group()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value / 1000.0 }))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
